audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits up to four (4) visitors at half-price admission. You will receive a promo code that can be redeemed on the date of your visit. This code cannot be redeemed online.

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass admits up to four (4) visitors at half-price admission. You will receive a promo code that can be redeemed on the date of your visit. This code cannot be redeemed online.
